providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Google OAuth with project-aware token payload

webSearch.apiKey.label: Gemini Search API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Gemini API key for Google Search grounding (fallback: GEMINI_API_KEY env var).

webSearch.model.label: Gemini Search Model
webSearch.model.help: Gemini model override for web search grounding.

webSearch.baseUrl.label: Gemini Search Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Optional Gemini API base URL for web search grounding proxies.
